HGSS.643.0001:
What? I can’t hear you very well.
Maybe we’ve got a bad connection?\f
Try calling again from somewhere else.
HGSS.643.0002:
Hello? What’s up?
I’m doing great!\f
HGSS.643.0003:
Aren’t there any other Trainers you’d
like to battle more than me?
HGSS.643.0004:
My free time?
I’m usually available Friday mornings.\r
Try calling me again then!
HGSS.643.0005:
Hey, you!\f
Battle me again!
What do you say? [0200,0000]
HGSS.643.0006:
All right!\f
I’ll be waiting for you in Saffron City’s
Fighting Dojo. Don’t be late!
HGSS.643.0007:
I see...
You must be pretty busy.
HGSS.643.0008:
Hmm...
Well, I appreciate that you want to\r
battle me again, but didn’t you promise\r
someone else?
HGSS.643.0009:
I’ll be waiting for you at the Fighting
Dojo in Saffron City.\r
Don’t forget! Come on!
HGSS.643.0010:
Yo! This is Lt. Surge.
How are you?\f
HGSS.643.0011:
Hey, did you forget that I’m standing
in the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City\r
waiting for you?\f
I guess I got here before you.
I’ll be waiting!
HGSS.643.0012:
So, why do you think I put all those
traps in the Vermilion Gym?\f
That’s right!
It’s to test the intellect of any\r
Trainer who comes in to battle!\f
Pokémon battles aren’t just about
power or stamina.\f
If you can balance power and
intelligence, then you’ve got the\r
makings to become a great Trainer!
HGSS.643.0013:
When I was fighting for my country,
I helped raise a lot of Trainers, taught\r
them the ropes.\f
But!\f
By the time you met me, you’d already
perfected your abilities!\f
Where did you train? Who taught you how
to battle?\f
It’s so strange and amazing!
HGSS.643.0014:
I’ve been studying this region’s
dialect during my time as Gym Leader\r
here in Vermilion.\f
But there’s still so many sayings that
I don’t understand.\f
Hey, will you talk with me some more?
We could teach each other some\r
new things to say!
